title: Exp Ores
description: Exp Ores adds new experience ores that drop a lot of experience orbs.
body:
# 🟢 Exp Ores
# ![An image of experience ore in Overworld.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a87d8d8ca6bbfcbeaf735fb23062f8ba910a83b6.png)

- Exp Ores adds new **experience ores** to the game. These new ores generate in Overworld, Nether and the End.
- Ores drop **between 96 and 128 experience points.**
- Overworld experience ores generate between **Y=-64 and Y=128**.
- Nether and end experience ores generate between **Y=0 and Y=96**.
